package.name: welding_msgs
package.description:
Intent message and action definitions for the ROBIN welding HRI PoC. Includes the original motion/weld intents (MOVE_TO_HOME, MOVE_TO_ZONE, EXECUTE_SEAM, ESTOP) and the four new ROBIN dashboard button intents (START_PROCESS, REQUEST_AI_RECOMMENDATION, MANUAL_ADJUST, FINE_TUNE_MODEL).
Mirrors the hri_actions_msgs/msg/Intent structure used in ErgoBot_AI.
